title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Treebo Hotels Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Treebo Hotels Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Treebo Hotels Global Group family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Treebo Hotels Global Group:
Treebo Hotels Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Treebo Hotels Global Group!
